tools.name: ua_status
tools.description: Get the status of Understand-Anything MCP

tools.name: ua_scan
tools.description: Checks whether a graph is currently loaded.

tools.name: ua_graph_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of the knowledge graph

tools.name: ua_architecture_report
tools.description: Generate an architecture report based on the knowledge graph

tools.name: ua_dependency_report
tools.description: Generate a dependency report based on the knowledge graph

tools.name: ua_explain
tools.description: Explain a specific part of the codebase

target.description: The file or module to explain

tools.name: ua_onboarding_doc
tools.description: Generate an onboarding document for the project

tools.name: ua_find_callers
tools.description: Find callers (reverse dependencies) of a specific file or module up to 2 hops

target.description: The file or module to find callers for

maxHops.description: Maximum number of hops (default 2, up to 2 hops supported for callers)

tools.name: ua_impact_analysis
tools.description: Analyze the impact of changing a file by finding all transitive reverse dependencies

target.description: The file or module to analyze for impact

tools.name: ua_precheck
tools.description: Pre-flight architectural risk check. Always call this tool before editing any file in the project. MUST be called before modifying any critical systems or refactoring.

target.description: The primary file or module you plan to modify (e.g. 'src/core/db.ts')

tools.name: ua_rules
tools.description: Evaluates the .ua-rules.json architectural constraints against the current knowledge graph. Generates a full violation report.

tools.name: ua_rules_check
tools.description: Mid-session continuous audit. Evaluates the .ua-rules.json constraints to ensure recent changes haven't introduced violations.

tools.name: ua_init_rules
tools.description: Initializes a starter .ua-rules.json file in the workspace if one doesn't already exist.

tools.name: ua_ci_check
tools.description: Analyzes PR diff impact using the graph. Enforces custom rules if .ua-rules.json is present. (Pro tier only)

pr_diff.description: The Git diff of the Pull Request.

tools.name: ua_validate_graph
tools.description: Validate the knowledge graph structure (Pro tier only)

graphData.description: The JSON string of the graph data to validate
